Watchboard Daily Brief — 2026-04-25

SAF Launches Coordinated Multi-State Offensive Across 6 States; RSF Drone Kills 13 in El-Obeid Residential House Including 8 Children
Pakistan Escalates IWT Dispute to UNSC on One-Year Suspension Anniversary; Field Marshal Munir Warns India of 'Decisive Response'
Trump Directs DOJ to Prioritize Death Penalty and Authorize Firing Squads; DOJ Drops Powell Probe
